last_prompt: Add tests for the per-task timeout and auto-retry feature. In core/src/ or cli/src/, add unit tests that verify: (1) a task with `timeout_seconds: 1` that takes longer than 1 second is marked as failed with a timeout error message, (2) a task with `max_retries: 2` that fails is reset to Pending status and only marked Failed after exceeding the retry limit, (3) a task with no timeout_seconds or max_retries behaves exactly as before. Run `cargo test` to confirm all tests pass.
